subcodes.first_line: O ye serene, contented and well-pleasing souls! Praise be unto God that ye are well aware how the heart and soul of 'Abdu'l-Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس مطمئنه الراضیه المرضیه الحمد لله واقف بر آنید که دل و جان عبدالبهاء چگونه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
